tests.description: Action buttons become ENABLED when round <= S1 pre-bid
tests.expected: Leave/Accept buttons enabled at pre-bid level

tests.description: First modal appears with S1 rank
tests.expected: Modal with rank + Back to event button
tests.observed:
firstModal={"rank":2,"dialogText":"You left the competition for "Lot 1".
You finished rank 2 bidding
at the price of 100,000 EUR
LINE ITEM	UNIT	QUANTITY	PRICE PER UNIT	TOTAL
Item 1	Ton	1	100,000	100,000 EUR
Back to eAuction","time":66439}

tests.description: Second modal appears at auction end
tests.observed:
secondModal={"rank":2,"dialogText":"The eAuction has ended!
You have finished with rank 2 bidding at the price of 100,000 EUR
Thank you for taking part in this event.
Back to eAuction","time":125915}

tests.expected: First and second modal show identical rank

tests.description: Winner identified via admin activity log (not leaderboard — Japanese has no leaderboard)
tests.expected: Activity log contains 'Bot 1 finished with rank 1'
tests.observed: Admin activity log: 'BOT 1 finished with rank 1' at 11:42:50. Graph shows BOT 1 with crown (👑) at winning price 93,000 EUR.

tests.description: Admin activity log matches supplier side (S1 rank 2, BOT 1 rank 1)
tests.expected: S1 sees rank 2 on supplier page + admin log says BOT 1 rank 1 (no contradiction)
tests.observed: Supplier: 'You finished rank 2 bidding at 100,000 EUR' + Admin: 'BOT 1 finished with rank 1'. Cross-view coherent.
